description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named rust checks that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow consists of three jobs: clippy, fmt, and test. The clippy job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with toolchain 1.68.0, checking the code with Clippy. The fmt job runs on ubuntu-latest, checking code formatting with rustfmt. The test job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with toolchains 1.68.0 and 1.60.0, running cargo test.
